en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makecee padalemeene, tyadrawa ’ongolo maapa’a na acilay.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?
It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?
The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?
There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: nosi’a ka koli’iya, madraw na koongo, matyadraw besebese.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: dryane ko va’iyane ka kakeceami padalemeene, mobalatiso ka siebela.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.
How’s the weather on the weekend?
It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: dryanenga ko va’iyane ka da’olo myani?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: dryane ko va’iyane ka no kathao ami, do’oliya.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: dryanenga ko va’iyane ka da’olo myani?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: esi, dryane ko va’iyane ka da’oloami.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?
It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: cyavili no kalakeceane ka kakece myani?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: esi, cyavili kalakeceane ka no kakeceami, sikopingnga ’angyadraw.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: nakay cicavili kalaapa’ane ka maapa’a nyani?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: esi, kalaapa’ane ka maapa’a, tyadrawa ’ongolo na acilay.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: madalame kake na kaladokodoko’ane, mabalesebese ka va’iyane.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很舒服。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: ikadalame kake na kalapapagane, kalapapagane ka madraw na sebee.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
